name: insight-engine
description: Verified, defensible investigation of high-stakes, complex, contested, and wicked problems — a strong model wrapped in assurance: a fail-safe proportionality triage, a fixed provocation page, source-tiered web verification with a disconfirmation pass, a conditional systems-investigation pass, deep-core routing, a forced judgement gate, an assumption-resilience check, a grade-locked decision brief, audience rendering, and a living investigation workspace.
